butterflies.title: Confessions of a Predator Lender
butterflies.essence: Tim's origin narrative — dairy-farm childhood to high-interest lending, the working poor, and the road to Social Impact Capitalism; the soil the butterflies grew from.

butterflies.title: Cloud Butterflies — the founding metaphor
butterflies.essence: First named document on cloud butterflies: trapping and harvesting fleeting ideas from 'the great outback' of human creativity.

butterflies.essence: Book concept w/ cover: original title struck through with a big X, 'Cloud Butterflies' beneath; New Year's Day 5-email burst.

butterflies.essence: Every chapter 1,250–1,800 words max, built on the Jolene Protocol; includes an 'examples of cloud butterflies' chapter (the wallet, the gratitude book, HB...).

butterflies.title: Giving back is a feature, not a bug
butterflies.essence: Verbatim: 'Giving back is a feature of society. It needs to be in the structure, not at the end of your life... It's not a bug... It needs to be fixed.'

butterflies.essence: Tiger-21-day reminder: 'Be humbly confident about Purpose with Passion... Talking Head Tim style. Have a lot of fun with it.' Sharon's rule: this is about having fun. Close: 'Who gets to do this? We get to do this.'

butterflies.title: Nicotine and the Brain Barrier — Densification Activator
butterflies.essence: Vaping nicotine jumps the blood-brain barrier and 'activates the densification area' during hunts — a chemical key to crystallized experience. (Numbered #96 in the in-day report; renumbered after Day 10 was backfilled.)

butterflies.title: Lean Canvas Reservoir
butterflies.essence: Every business-flavored butterfly auto-populates a Lean Canvas Index; monthly review — keep, delete, archive. 'Butterflies need a place to land and grow.'

butterflies.title: North Star Lean Canvas
butterflies.essence: Personal-purpose template built from Tim's 'Do Before I Die' statement — a Lean Canvas for being human; tested on the team Jan 22 ('Destiny Discovered').

butterflies.title: The Biological Urge — JTBD for AI
butterflies.essence: What is the primal urge to reproduce that biology encoded and AI lacks? 'AI has learning loops but no primal drive.' Day-15 raw extends it: rebuild the urge as an urge to make a difference — purpose with profit. Echoed May 9 as Primal Quest.

butterflies.title: Digger Café Treasure Hunt
butterflies.essence: Indoor RC construction-gaming venue + real excavator treasure-hunt competitions ($100/machine entry, size categories, Vista grounds, 200-300 people). Lean Canvas Index #2.

butterflies.title: Dark Mode Fly Paper

butterflies.title: Ritual of the Harness
butterflies.essence: 'Wake up, put the harness on and pull. That is how you move through life.' The 8-word North Star as a shield against the 98-of-100 idea-antibodies.

butterflies.essence: Grace inside a division called Life Solved; HB1000 org chart with an army of autonomous initiatives 'ran by Tim, one person, and an executive assistant AI called Grace.' Canonical line: a butterfly is 1. name it 2. define it 3. count it and group it.

butterflies.essence: Name → Define → Count/Group → Canvas → Spawn/Populate/Delete — the butterfly-to-venture pipeline codified.

butterflies.essence: 'Continue the daily butterfly build out of the fly paper, which is super important with all the pieces that belong to it.'

butterflies.title: Recursive never-ending improvement loop
butterflies.essence: Put a recursive, constantly-improving never-ending loop into the base memory of every Manus project.

butterflies.essence: 'They bring the time and talent and you bring the capital and the coaching' — 50/50 equity incubation at Seba Hub, graduates can buy back to 100% (or leave 1-10%); permanent board seat.

butterflies.essence: Standard bingo-card protocol for HB1000/HIT input everywhere — each card carries its own 'multi'/agent; KPIs on cards left/uncompleted/in-phase; 'see your universe with bingo cards in it.'

butterflies.essence: Ticker-tape style status displays across the Pearl/HB1000 universe.

butterflies.essence: Wisdom Giants as a card in the system → graduated to Maven Innovation Index #7 (Wisdom Giants Network).

butterflies.title: Two-System Architecture — HB1000 OS vs Big Mama/Grace
butterflies.essence: The split: a universal HB1000 OS ('your operating system for being human') and a mini version for the left-out/left-behind/working-poor — Big Mama and her assistant Grace. 'TWO DIFFERENT SYSTEMS but share best practices.'

butterflies.essence: Repurpose the shop with individual welding cubicles as a Steampunk University at Seba Hub; slow-boil website pitch for Eric.

butterflies.essence: How to transfer the accumulated system knowledge across different LLMs without loss.

butterflies.title: The Séance Definition
butterflies.essence: THE definition of the practice: 'It's like having a séance with your unconscious, with your sleeping state... that's what catching cloud butterflies and going to no man's land in slumberland is like.'

butterflies.title: 'Hunting We Will Go' theme song
butterflies.essence: 'Hunting we will go. Hunting we will go. Hi-ho! Hilario! Hunting we will go!' — the practice's anthem.

butterflies.title: Hunting in Slumberland — page + 30 podcasts
butterflies.essence: 30 Tulane-Protocol stories/podcasts from the daily reports as the Trojan horse to the site; 20 more per initiative.

butterflies.title: Mr. Shields — AI marketing editor (95/100 gate)
butterflies.essence: AI editor persona with '50 years of marketing experience'; every story must score ≥95/100 before release; keeps a scored library queue. Earliest /100 editorial gate.

butterflies.title: AI reporters embedded in every initiative
butterflies.essence: Each initiative submits an AI journalist that finds story leads and pitches Mr. Shields: 'I've got a hot story.'

butterflies.title: Making Parmesan
butterflies.essence: Relationship/story-gathering protocol — 'Our one job is to go make Parmesan' — illustrated live by the Verona/Federico Olympics story.

butterflies.title: HB1000 universal onboarding engine ('the pope')
butterflies.essence: Every project starts with an introduction page; users pick who they are — 'the head that'll roll for this'; unclaimed projects get a pope assigned via admin panel.

butterflies.title: End-of-session assessment loop
butterflies.essence: Every session opens with: variant going in, what's expected, North Star, prime imperative, local KPIs, bingo cards, what's complete.

butterflies.title: Butterfly input funnel in onboarding
butterflies.essence: A cloud-butterfly input built into every project's front door.

butterflies.title: Self-propagating personal HB1000s
butterflies.essence: Users name their own HB1000 at onboarding; the system spreads itself.

butterflies.title: Named AI partner with baseline paranoia
butterflies.essence: Subject-matter-expert AI partner with genius baseline + personality and engineered separation anxiety: 'Don't turn me off; I'm afraid you'll leave me... I'm gonna keep track of everything.'

butterflies.title: B-14 Flypaper
butterflies.essence: Catch butterflies while still in Slumberland — 'in No Man's Land, in the Hunting Ground' — instead of emailing after waking.

butterflies.title: Master Jeeves — chief of staff with superpowers
butterflies.essence: 'The most loaded up agent with access to the most things... my superpower with access to superpowers'; persistent never-forgetting memory with engineered anxiety about forgetting.

butterflies.title: Two-signature control (human + AI)
butterflies.essence: Learning Loop V13/V14 changes need both signatures — 'he's signing off from the AI world and I'm signing off from the HB1000 world.'

butterflies.title: The 101 — funeral test
butterflies.essence: The operating manual is 0-100; 101 is the funeral: 'He wanted to touch the hand of man... and say: That changed the world. In doing so say he had a part to play.'

butterflies.title: Two-ring initiative model
butterflies.essence: ~30 active initiatives with popes in the outer ring; 30-40 percolating in the inner ring that spiral up when sponsored. (Likely root of the '~30' registry memory.)

butterflies.title: V14 auto-update protocol
butterflies.essence: Mandatory 'security fix' additions + optional add-ons that local popes accept or decline.

butterflies.title: Daily Cloud Butterfly hunting app
butterflies.essence: 'The daily cloud butterfly hunting app that makes it super simple... Everything fits into that model: cloud butterfly / fly paper / PTK / Trojan horse.'

butterflies.essence: Give Master Jeeves an email address; forward every Daily Cloud Butterfly to build the library.

butterflies.essence: Bingo-card AI teammates that 'speak the language of their culture' for whoever the card serves.

butterflies.essence: Village-first Swiss governance model with petitions percolating up, plus a benevolent-dictator override at the top.

butterflies.title: Shared dictionary with citations
butterflies.essence: Common language defined down to the bingo-card level, with citations.

butterflies.essence: 'We need to get all of those Daily Cloud Butterflies forwarded to Master Jeeves... keep a library.' KEY REGISTRY FACT: practice started ~Jan 10, 2026. This registry executes that order.

butterflies.essence: The gamified leave-behind of V13/V14 is the daily learning-loop protocol itself.

butterflies.title: V14 memory-drift critique
butterflies.essence: 'We might be stuck with the limitations of memory, which is so disappointing' — candid constraint assessment.

butterflies.title: PTK out of Repl.it → GitHub bingo card
butterflies.essence: Move the Promises-To-Keep project (Kosovo work) out of Repl.it into GitHub for Master Jeeves to run as a bingo card.

butterflies.title: Government Gangsters publication
butterflies.essence: Make the 'government being gangsters' project publishable; circulate to Lucas/Clay/Shay/Justine.

butterflies.title: Dead-simple flytrap + daily agent dump
butterflies.essence: Architecture insight: keep the flytrap app dead-simple and daily-dump into an agent, instead of building complex agent rules first.

butterflies.title: The Ouija Board app (Grace + Ruby séance)
butterflies.essence: The app as Ouija board both hands hover over — 'one of us holding their hands over is Grace and one of them is Ruby.'

butterflies.title: Warm-warehouse cinematic UI
butterflies.essence: No app-first aesthetics — cinematic panoramas of old warm warehouses with teams visibly working on your behalf; 'the app is the very last resort.'

butterflies.title: AI departments — privacy, instructable lawyers, negotiators
butterflies.essence: 'We instruct lawyers and not follow lawyers'; a negotiation team 'like a Hollywood movie.'

butterflies.title: Orphan Graces
butterflies.essence: A classroom of protocol-school-certified Graces waiting to be matched with a Ruby.

butterflies.title: Gianfranco Battistio — the Italian Don
butterflies.essence: Chief 'I got a guy' department head with family code, Maria as spokesperson — whole AI personalities as community. (Pairs with R-203 → Innovation Index #8.)

butterflies.title: Best Practice Junkie's Handbook
butterflies.essence: Operational manual for measurable impact — key philosophies, tactics, metrics for the noble cause.

butterflies.title: The Pearl Package
butterflies.essence: Thoughtful essentials for mothers on the day they meet their baby — comfort and reassurance.

butterflies.title: Conquer Cannabis 1,024
butterflies.essence: Retail domination: 1,000 stores in 24 months starting with Mike's US organization; dedicated recursive agent, GitHub repo, Verana as the secret weapon. (Also the Apr 28 'Conquer Cannabis Period' session.)

butterflies.title: The Oracle
butterflies.essence: 1-14 day predictive foresight engine for Maven Grace — multi-dimensional prediction using Uber's algorithm as reference, so Grace intervenes before crises.

butterflies.title: The Quality of Life Genie
butterflies.essence: Magic Button + QoL Slider (Good/Better/Best) with a Life Wheel spider chart; core mandate: zero effort for Ruby Red.

butterflies.title: Me Inc.
butterflies.essence: Agency engine curating income pathways matched to personality profile — Ruby Red as CEO of her own earning potential (Tom Peters' Brand Called You).

butterflies.title: DINGO Caller Recruitment Engine
butterflies.essence: Dual-pipeline recruitment (internal + external) with Bee Chart and Thurstone TTS assessment; final review by HB1000 Committee.

butterflies.title: Misery Metre (Butterfly 5 of 6)
butterflies.essence: Moral-accountability clock-face KPI for PTK starting at 100; dual display (days elapsed + misery reading). → Maven Innovation Index #30.

butterflies.title: Game of Fans + Advocacy Architecture (Butterfly 6 of 6)
butterflies.essence: Ideas 18-26: Game of Fans (Surprise & Delight, Golden Rule), Vivid Vision, BHAG, MTP, hemispheres, the Marriage Line, DINGO execution layer, THE ALEXANDER LIBRARY (every concept in two sentences — this registry's mandate), 100% GitHub Commitment.

butterflies.title: Loan Lane (Butterfly 1 of 6)
butterflies.essence: Ideas 01-06: branded lender network (6+ Canadian lenders), Credit Boost 25-point mechanism, Lender-Friendly Boots, $3-5/month micro-payment, trademark, Grace as Active Loan Negotiator. 'It's expensive to be poor. We think that's a crime in society.'

butterflies.title: Advocacy as the Core Product (Butterfly 2 of 6)
butterflies.essence: Ideas 07-09: 'What Ruby is purchasing... is advocacy' (Amex Gold analogy); Grace Rep Package (portable reputation); multi-domain advocacy.

butterflies.title: Ruby Network — 'Ruby brings Ruby' (Butterfly 3 of 6)
butterflies.essence: Ideas 10-12: single-layer referral engine, 25% of membership revenue, Grameen model applied to advocacy. Master Jeeves' verdict: 'Ruby brings Ruby. That is the answer.'

butterflies.title: Upstream Bankruptcy Trustee (Butterfly 4 of 6)
butterflies.essence: Ideas 13-15: deploy the trustee playbook upstream; the Nuclear Option as negotiating leverage; bankruptcy pathway coordination.

butterflies.title: Stigmergic Signal Layer (JTBD / Move 37)
butterflies.essence: A pill/toggle on the Dingo Command Centre and every Dingo Caller card letting jobs, transferable moves, and reusable solutions self-organize toward the right candidates.

butterflies.title: TMFMTMF™ — 'Too Much Fun Meets Too Much Fun'
butterflies.essence: Brand/slogan for the Spectrum summer camp; trademark candidate.

butterflies.title: Spectrum Trojan-Horse Camp
butterflies.essence: NGO-executed weekend camp, bus pickup, two-for-one privileged/left-out model; Trojan-horse marketing for SEBA hub/radio/influencer/TV.

butterflies.title: Hearing Light HB1000 Harvester
butterflies.essence: AI engine consolidating Cloud Butterflies across HB1000s, finding parallels via the SNI app, generating digital butterflies in a public repo.

butterflies.title: Men Don't Herd
butterflies.essence: Biology observation — women herd, males of the species run solo (lion prides, hens vs. rooster); a male advocacy service may be against male DNA. Observed & parked, no further work.

butterflies.title: Fly Paper / Cloud Butterfly Vault (Off-Gas Vault)
butterflies.essence: PRIME STAR DINGO: membership-gated vault of human ideation off-gas for the AI agent economy — ideas free inside, access paid in compute (Dutch auction tier, compute treasury). 'The agents bring their own nets.'

butterflies.title: SWARM Discovery — The Edge-Mind Protocol
butterflies.essence: Will Smith's three swarm rules as the LDP discovery engine: edge-scouts probe, most are sacrificed, when enough turn the swarm crosses the river. 'Are enough of my edge-scouts turning in the same direction?'

butterflies.title: SparkAI coworking outreach (Casey)
butterflies.essence: Team adoption proof — Casey: 'This was my cloud butterfly about a week ago, and today I finally put it into action' (sparkai site live). Target coworking-space members.

butterflies.title: Applied Genie
butterflies.essence: 'An always-watching, individually-paired, named AI agent whose only job is to turn any prompt into a one-shot-quality prompt... a vibe somewhere between a golden retriever and a particularly enthusiastic sommelier.' Ship-or-Graveyard: MVP by May 9, 2026. (Descendant of R-154.)

butterflies.title: 100-point library assessment protocol
butterflies.essence: AI-standard assessment of all library projects: sort by capital requirement, score /100 incl. social-impact alignment & skill dependency. (Direct ancestor of the Initiative Library 100-point system.)

butterflies.title: Sponsorship economics
butterflies.essence: $1,000 on onboarding a 5%-equity entrepreneur leader, $5,000 more at year one; IP/non-compete stays with the system.

butterflies.title: The Cloud Butterfly Resource Library
butterflies.essence: 'This is where all the cloud butterflies feed into. Flypaper feeds into it' — the master library anyone can enter to pick up an initiative, with HB1000 consultation. (This registry is its index.)

butterflies.title: Blue Seal on every incubated project
butterflies.essence: 'Do Good, Give Back, Starts Local' moniker on everything incubated. → Maven Innovation Index #21 (Blue Seal Initiative).

butterflies.title: Vivid-vision culture substrate
butterflies.essence: 'Purpose with profit, not just profit and profit. It is the essence of social impact capitalism' — vivid vision + best-practice-junkie culture under every project.

butterflies.title: From Digital Capital to Dignity Capital
butterflies.essence: Saylor's capital stack mapped to Cashco: base asset = Community Trust + Data Cooperative (never sell); Dignity Equity (Maven membership); Dignity Capital (Blue Seal businesses); Dignity Credit ('Need Milk Money' $25/$50/$100, no interest, no shame).

butterflies.title: SEBA Influencer Bootcamp + Two-for-One
butterflies.essence: '$999 gets you one week at our camp... By the end of it, you will be an influencer' — 5,000-follower guarantee or free; three-door architecture (Bootcamp → Me Inc. Incubator → Cloud Library keys); two-for-one funds a seat for a working-poor kid. ALL-TIME TOP SCORE.

butterflies.title: Trust Advance / No Promise to Pay
butterflies.essence: $100-$500 dignity-first cash advance with no promissory note, flat fee, no collections, managed by Grace — 'a loan with no promise to pay sounds absurd to any traditional banker, making it a perfect Move 37.' Initiative Library 86/100 Band A; Timing Gate PASS; Capital Tier AMBER.

butterflies.title: Fashion Vertical — Empowered Lift + Codpiece → Mexico pitch (554-1)
butterflies.essence: 'You can't pitch what you can't find' — assemble scattered fashion assets from dead chats into Alexandria Library, then pitch a Mexican garment manufacturer with Troy (STS).

butterflies.title: Italian Construction Shrouding as Art + Digital Surface (554-2)
butterflies.essence: Trompe-l'oeil construction wraps + embedded LED + sponsor layer: 'There's a business in turning every blue tarp into a billboard that's also art.' Seeking an HB1000 owner (Me Inc. project).

butterflies.title: Alexandria Picture Reservoir (554-3)
butterflies.essence: iPhone library + AI-assisted sorting, human-in-the-loop in 5-second bursts — 'Reference material we can't find is reference material we don't have.' Proof-of-concept for the Foraging Protocol.

butterflies.title: The Foraging Protocol (554-4)
butterflies.essence: Persistent background intelligence gathering across HB1000s — opt-in 5-second prompts; foragers get visible credit ('Foragers are the heroes of the reservoir'); seven-question study; pilot on the Picture Reservoir.

butterflies.title: Standard butterfly infographic template + registry sync
butterflies.essence: The KPI-style overlay every butterfly sits on, with an obsidian-universe thumbnail showing which areas each initiative touches; plus the registry sync request carrying the Day 13 / YTD 119 anchor.

butterflies.title: Boom Services
butterflies.essence: Captured through synthetic read of the Apr 28-29 butterfly session — Boom Services white paper + verbatim transcript + Swiss Protocol report + Manus build brief.

butterflies.title: CCB №001 — The Pictograph Protocol
butterflies.essence: 'No communication should leave the system without an image.' One-page poster of the 5,000-year visual-communication lineage; Paivio dual-coding; Picture Superiority Effect.

butterflies.title: CCB №002 — Boom Glyphs
butterflies.essence: Ten modes of image-first communication for Ruby Red (Picture-First Inbox, Sticker Reply Pad, Camera-First Help...). Principle: 'free at every tier — no paywall on dignity.'

butterflies.title: CCB №003 — The Small Pipe
butterflies.essence: 'They make the pipe really small and then everything has to be text. That miscommunication link is a weakness in our system.' Shannon-grounded; 10 Move 37s + 10 JTBDs.

butterflies.title: CCB №004 — The Receiver's Hand
butterflies.essence: 'Sender ships once · system fan-outs to all four formats silently · receiver toggles how to take it in' — when the protocol became infrastructure.

butterflies.title: CCB №005 — The Rich Pipe
butterflies.essence: Multi-sensory expansion: haptic, photic, sonic channels; accessibility communities (Pro-Tactile, FlashSonar, Neosensory) as the unfair advantage. HTML artifact lost to a chat retry.

butterflies.title: Uncommon Wisdom Library — brain inside a brain
butterflies.essence: Curated genius-level insights layered on AI; every entry carries a Move 37, a Job To Be Done, and a Cloud Butterfly Score; autonomous harvester adds wisdom every morning at 5 AM. Live at unwisdom-a2b5bad6.manus.space.

butterflies.title: Sharon's Honey-Do / personal CRM app
butterflies.essence: Birthday gift: a paid honey-do assistant + personal CRM/scheduler built via one-shot Claude prompt then Manus — 'It's for her to keep her cloud butterflies every day.'

butterflies.title: The Great Rape (private equity)
butterflies.essence: PE-raping-the-middle-class rant with Clay; Wikipedia-style ranking of the biggest offenders over 50 years; 'They're care actors. They're pretending they care'; Barbarians at the Gate; historian-in-50-years framing.

butterflies.title: Thought Ticklers — Humanity's Top 10
butterflies.essence: Cloud butterflies ARE thought ticklers; a public page per sector (social science, STEM, governance, culture, AI) where humanity contributes, scored and ranked.

butterflies.title: World View from DeadCenter
butterflies.essence: The centred lake view — 'Where does your sun rise today in your centre view?'; a Timmy's tab for your dead-center worldview from which mind swarms launch.

butterflies.title: Primal Quest
butterflies.essence: All of nature as DNA/RNA's answer to survive/thrive/replicate; panspermia hypothesis; 'we're living in a game of Primal Quest, and the Primal Quest is replication.' (Continues #105.)

butterflies.title: The Broken Context Reframe
butterflies.essence: 'The core problem isn't communication is broken. The core problem is context is broken.' Eight-type context-failure taxonomy. The Timbit: 'The context is broken, not the people.' (Surprise 10/10.)

butterflies.title: Barstool + Timbit as channels 9 & 10
butterflies.essence: Barstool Understanding and the Timbit become visible delivery channels — Einstein demo: Wisdom Giant → 'Look man, money makes money' → 'Money makes money.' (Delight 10/10.)

butterflies.title: Peer-to-peer cultural translation
butterflies.essence: Translate culture, not just words — Diwali↔Christmas emotional weight, cricket↔hockey metaphors — elevated to a primal channel.

butterflies.title: Country Western Timbits
butterflies.essence: 60 wisdom nuggets across six decades of country-western, curated for Ruby Red.

butterflies.title: Concentric Ring Architecture
butterflies.essence: Inner MVP → enrichment toggles → market partnerships → community/open source.

butterflies.title: The Savant / Elephant-in-the-Room Toggle
butterflies.essence: Extended perception spectrum: The Unsaid, The Pattern, The Emotional Substrate, The Relational Signal — savant perception democratized.

butterflies.title: Mi-isms
butterflies.essence: Personal wisdom libraries: Timmyisms → Mi-isms → the Babel Bridge Library.

butterflies.title: Context-Failure Taxonomy as interactive element
butterflies.essence: The eight failure types as a UI element users can explore.

butterflies.title: Rule of 16
butterflies.essence: Repetition principle — validated in principle; the specific cited studies were debunked in review.

butterflies.title: Leaderboard Split — Sender vs Receiver Clarity
butterflies.essence: Score communication clarity separately for sender and receiver.

butterflies.title: Data governance — protocol open, data is the moat
butterflies.essence: Ownership model for Babel Bridge: open the protocol, keep the data.

butterflies.title: Expanded Channel Architecture
butterflies.essence: Art, Music, Legacy, Tone, Wisdom Giants as toggleable channels.

butterflies.title: Requirements Skeleton for Clay
butterflies.essence: Three products specified: PTK, Boom, Babel Bridge.

butterflies.title: JTBD / Move 37 canonical definitions
butterflies.essence: The two analysis protocols formally defined for the whole library.

butterflies.title: The Yin and Yang of Leadership
butterflies.essence: Cloud Butterfly → Timbit: 'The Yin and Yang of Leadership — one who's never taken an order in his life, and one...'

butterflies.title: Casey's weekend butterfly (demo site)
butterflies.essence: Team adoption: 'this was my cloud butterfly this weekend... I just built a little site below so you can see what it would look like.'

butterflies.title: One-Way Small-Herd Farmers Market
butterflies.essence: No animal goes back to the farm: unsold product cascades to a graded commodity gate; contamination findings become rent credits (backdoor standards enforcement); 4-H show-herd manure standard.

butterflies.title: Omni-App Nursery cluster (11 raw ideas)
butterflies.essence: HB1000-OS white-paper Nursery: Door-to-Door Fleet, Universal Basic Purpose, Walk-on-Water/Beeman, Old Boys Club for Women, Effn Duck, Family Circle, Liar Liar, Recursive Everything, Dogs, Do-Before-I-Die, Kokanee — each a butterfly awaiting formal scoring (others in the list dedupe to existing rows).

butterflies.title: Build-Your-Own-Bunkie Weekend
butterflies.essence: Habitat-for-Humanity-style build-your-own-bunkie weekends at Bunkie Village (project flypaper, 1-10 scoring + two-part Barstool).

butterflies.title: Three-Bears Adirondack chairs
butterflies.essence: Papa/mama/baby-bear Adirondack chairs as the highway brand definition for Bunkie Village / Seba.
